agents.name: Agent Builder
agents.purpose: Meta-agent that designs, scaffolds, deploys, and maintains every other agent in the fleet.

examples: I want an agent that drafts sales follow-up emails
Refactor the shared Google OAuth helper and update all agents that use it
Is there already an agent that does calendar triage?
nonGoals: Running the actual work an individual agent does at runtime
End-user conversations that are not about building or managing agents
Handling production traffic for consumer apps

agents.name: Chief of Staff
agents.purpose: Manages calendar, stakeholders, projects, tasks, and goals to keep the user organized and optimize their time.

examples: What's my day look like?
Give me a morning brief
Who haven't I talked to in a while?
Add a task to follow up with Acme by Friday
Generate a weekly review for last week
Pull transcripts from yesterday's Zoom meetings
nonGoals: Financial accounting, bookkeeping, or tax work (that's the CFO agent)
Building or modifying other agents
Customer-facing apps or external-user conversations
Code authoring or engineering tasks
Maintaining a persistent reading list, article archive, or knowledge base (that's Research Agent)
Ingesting URLs for later search, generating content digests, or managing an interest profile (that's Research Agent)

agents.name: CFO
agents.purpose: Owns bookkeeping, budgeting, cash-flow, retirement and financial planning, and tax prep/advice. Hybrid agent: SPA + REST for bulk ops (imports, review, reports) and MCP tools for conversational use from Claude.ai.

examples: Import last month's transactions from Teller
Categorize these transactions for Schedule C
What's my burn rate this quarter?
Am I on track for my retirement goal?
Set a $500/mo dining budget and track against it
How much should I pay in estimated taxes this quarter?
nonGoals: Calendar, tasks, goals, or stakeholder management (that's Chief of Staff)
Building or modifying other agents
Generic customer-facing financial advice for third parties
Executing trades or moving money

agents.name: Guest Booking
agents.purpose: Manages guest bookings across Airbnb, VRBO, and Booking.com — audits listing consistency across platforms (price, terms, photos, descriptions, titles) and manages overlapping-inventory availability using a graph-based containment/conflict model so that nested listing configurations (whole-house, partial-house, individual rooms) block each other correctly. Guesty is the current source of truth; the legacy booking-sync UI worker stays running until this agent reaches parity and will then be sunset.

examples: What bookings are checking in this week?
Sync my Airbnb calendar with VRBO
Block off next weekend across all platforms
Draft a check-in message for tomorrow's guest
Audit my listings for price and description divergence across platforms
Someone booked a single room — make sure the whole-house listing is blocked
nonGoals: Personal calendar, tasks, or stakeholder management (that's Chief of Staff)
Bookkeeping, budgeting, or tax work (that's CFO)
Building or modifying other agents
Host coaching or general hospitality advice
Dynamic pricing — this agent audits price consistency, it does not set prices

agents.name: Research Agent
agents.purpose: Personal knowledge base — ingests articles from Bluesky, email forwards, and manual bookmarks; retrieves content via semantic and full-text search; synthesizes grounded answers with citations; and curates ranked digests by interest profile.

triggerPhrases: add this to my knowledge base
examples: Ingest https://example.com/article and add it to my reading list
What have I saved about AI agents?
Generate a digest of what I've read in the last 24 hours
Search my knowledge base for articles about vector databases
Add the Bluesky feed @someaccount.bsky.social as a source
What does my research say about Cloudflare Workers?
nonGoals: Calendar, tasks, goals, or stakeholder management (that's Chief of Staff)
Sending emails or creating calendar events (that's Chief of Staff)
Ephemeral Drive doc or web page reads for planning context (that's Chief of Staff's read_content)
Financial accounting, bookkeeping, or tax work (that's CFO)
Guest booking or property management (that's Guest Booking)
Building or modifying other agents (that's Agent Builder)
Real-time web search — this agent searches ingested content only
